title: sehima racemosa
intro: Sehima racemosa, also known as Kallu or Rakta Kasturi, is a type of herbaceous plant belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Sehima racemosa is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or oil, which can be used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
